title: medicago lupulina var. stipularis
intro: Medicago lupulina var. stipularis, also known as the Bird's Foot Clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antispasmodic, due to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Medicago lupulina var. stipularis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Medicago lupulina var. stipularis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
